title: BarBits Black Melamine Ashtrays 4" Pack of 10 - Outside Garden Cigarette Bins, Stackable Ash Trays, Plastic Ash Bins
features: Exceptional Value and Durability: The BarBits Black Melamine Ashtrays provide a smart and contemporary solution for disposing of cigarette ends. Made from durable melamine, these ashtrays are shatterproof and easy to clean, offering exceptional value for both home and commercial use.

Ideal for Outdoor Gatherings: Perfect for garden parties, barbeques, and pub gardens, these ashtrays feature 8 notches around the bowl, allowing guests to enjoy their time outside with friends, perhaps with a beer in hand. An essential accessory for any outdoor event.

Stackable and Space-Saving: Designed for convenience, these ashtrays are stackable, making them easy to store when not in use. Their compact design ensures they take up minimal space, perfect for both home and commercial settings.

Dishwasher Safe for Easy Cleaning: These ashtrays are dishwasher safe, ensuring easy and efficient cleaning. Their robust melamine material withstands frequent washing, maintaining their sleek appearance and functionality.

Modern Design with Practical Features: Featuring a round shape and sleek black color, these ashtrays blend seamlessly with any decor. The 8 notches provide ample space for cigarettes, making them a practical choice for smokers.
